text:
is an original character that appears in the video game Neon Genesis Evangelion: Shinji Ikari Raising Project.

Profile

Technician responsible of the Casper. She is in charge of Shinji's sensitivity training program. She is half Russian and half Japanese, she also enjoys drinking vodka.

History

Neon Genesis Evangelion: Shinji Ikari Raising Project

Neon Genesis Evangelion: Shinji Ikari Raising Project manga

Neon Genesis Evangelion: Gakuen Datenroku

In Neon Genesis Evangelion: Gakuen Datenroku, Satsuki is one of the nuns in the NERV Academy during the day, but she is actually a NERV member as her real ocupation. Neon Genesis Evangelion: Gakuen Datenroku Volume 3, chapter 12 

Trivia

Her surname, Ōi comes from the of the Japanese Imperial Navy.
